title: sanvitalia ocymoides
intro: Sanvitalia ocymoides, also known as the 'Lobster Flower' or 'False Calendula', is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sanvitalia ocymoides include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
